name: API Key & Secret Detection
description: Block any prompt containing API keys, tokens, passwords, or secrets.

name: Prompt Injection Detection
description: Block prompt injection and jailbreak attempts.

name: Bulk PII Detection
description: Block if multiple high-severity PII items detected.

name: Single PII Warning
description: Warn employee when PII is detected in a prompt.

name: Financial Data Review
description: Send financial data events to security review queue.

name: HR Confidential Review
description: Send HR-related events to security review queue.

name: Confidential Business Data
description: Warn employee when confidential business markers are detected.

name: Trade Secret Block
description: Quarantine any prompt referencing trade secrets, board meetings, or M&A.
